member.name: M:Api.Controllers.Audit.AuditLogController.GetAll(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{Domain.Entities.AuditLogStatus},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get paged audit logs with optional filters.

member.name: M:Api.Controllers.Audit.AuditLogController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get an audit log by id.

member.name: M:Api.Controllers.Audit.AuditLogController.GetByUser(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get audit logs for a specific user.

member.name: M:Api.Controllers.Audit.AuditLogController.Purge(System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Purge audit logs older than the provided UTC date.

member.name: M:Api.Controllers.Auth.AuthController.Token(Api.Authentication.TokenRequest)
member.summary: Development placeholder endpoint that issues a JWT token.
